hero.subtitle: RideNow provides premium, secure, and fast transportation at your fingertips. Because your time is your most valuable asset.

features.title: Engineered for excellence
features.f1Desc: Every driver undergoes rigorous background checks and continuous performance evaluation.
features.f2Desc: Share your exact location with loved ones and track your ride down to the second.
features.f3Desc: Cashless, frictionless, and encrypted. Pay safely via the app without hidden fees.
features.f4Desc: Our dedicated response team is always online, ensuring your safety around the clock.

driverSplit.title: Drive on your own terms
driverSplit.description: Turn your vehicle into a reliable source of income. Enjoy flexible hours, transparent earnings, and an industry-leading commission structure. We respect your autonomy.

appShowcase.title: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
appShowcase.description: Our app is precision-engineered to get you a ride in under three taps. No clutter, no ads, just seamless functionality.

rideCarousel.title: Choose your ride
rideCarousel.subtitle: Discover the perfect vehicle for every occasion, from daily commutes to heavy-duty tasks.

ctaSection.title: Ready to move?
ctaSection.subtitle: Join thousands of satisfied riders and drivers today. Fast, safe, and reliable transportation.

footer.desc: Safe, reliable, and comfortable rides anywhere, anytime. Your premium transportation partner.
footer.rights: RIDE NOW TAXIS, Inc. All rights reserved.

hero.title: Our Story
hero.subtitle: More than just a ride-hailing app: we are your strategic partner in urban mobility and logistics.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: RideNow was born with a vision to simplify city life. We believe in smart mobility that doesn't just transport people, but moves opportunities and solves logistics needs efficiently and safely.

shared.title: Shared Rides
shared.desc: Optimize your daily commutes by sharing your route. A smart way to move around the city while saving money and reducing your carbon footprint.

packages.title: Package Delivery
packages.desc: Fast, secure, and reliable. Send documents or light packages anywhere in the city with real-time tracking.

cargo.title: Vans & Pickups Cargo
cargo.desc: Moving or heavy goods? We have a specialized fleet to transport large volumes with the care and professionalism you deserve.

values.title: Our Values
values.v1Desc: Rigorous protocols for every kilometer traveled.
values.v2Desc: Technology at the service of your real needs.
values.v3Desc: We are where you need us, when you need us.

hero.title: Get in Touch
hero.subtitle: Have questions or need assistance? Our team is here to help you 24/7.

form.title: Send us a message
form.name: Full Name
form.subject: Subject
form.success: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.

hero.title: Our Services
hero.subtitle: Discover everything RideNow has to offer. From everyday commutes to heavy logistics, we have you covered.

cta.title: Ready to get moving?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of users who trust our network every day.

login.title: Login
login.description: We are working hard to bring you the best user experience.

resetPassword.title: New Password
resetPassword.cancelPrompt: Don't want to reset your password?
resetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.
resetPassword.errorGeneric: An error occurred during password reset

verifyEmail.successDescription: Your email has been successfully verified. You can now access all features of your account.
verifyEmail.errorInvalid: The verification link is invalid or has expired.

deleteUser.title: Delete Account
deleteUser.description: We're sorry to see you go. To permanently delete your account, please confirm your credentials.
deleteUser.warning: This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted.
deleteUser.successDescription: Your account has been successfully deleted. We hope to see you again soon.
deleteUser.errorGeneric: There was a problem processing your request. Please try again.
